summary: Frontend-only testing of MTSS WellTrack chronic absentee badge feature. All 7 tested features pass. Tested against local backend (localhost:8001) due to CORS issue when using external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from localhost:3000.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured. CA badge (data-testid=chronic-badge-{student_id}) correctly renders for students with attendance_pct < 90%.
filterChronicOnly state correctly shared between chip and filter-chronic-toggle for consistent behavior.
filter-chronic-toggle is hidden on mobile (hidden sm:flex) - intentional responsive design.
updated_files: /app/frontend/.env (temporarily changed for testing, restored to original)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chronic absentee badge feature fully working. 251 enrolled students, 39 with attendance < 90% showing CA badge. Header chip '39 chronic absentees' (data-testid=chronic-absentee-summary-chip) clickable and toggles filter. filter-chronic-toggle (Chronic Absence button) in filter bar also working. Both controls share same filterChronicOnly state. Dashboard, Interventions, Screening pages all load correctly (regression passed).

results.ca_badges: PASS - 39 CA badges visible for students with attendance_pct < 90%
results.chronic_chip: PASS - '39 chronic absentees' chip in header (data-testid=chronic-absentee-summary-chip)
results.chip_filter: PASS - clicking chip filters to 39 students, chip turns rose-600 when active
results.filter_toggle: PASS - Chronic Absence button (data-testid=filter-chronic-toggle) toggles filter, turns rose-600 when active
results.filter_off: PASS - toggling off restores all 251 students
